name: handoff
description: Hand off a build or review task to another one-shot headless agent — Codex, Grok, Kiro, Claude, opencode, or Cursor — over a single uniform, fail-closed contract. The prompt is fed as literal bytes (never argv), trust is scoped to the verb (read-only for review, least-write for build), and an agent that cannot run is reported as gateNotRun, never a fabricated clean.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate build & review to Codex, Grok, Kiro, Claude, opencode, or Cursor
interface.longDescription: Hand off one bounded build or review to another one-shot headless coding agent over a single uniform, fail-closed contract. The brief is delivered as literal bytes (never on argv), trust is scoped to the verb (read-only review, least-write build; the dangerous bypass only under an explicit autonomous mode), and a build is judged by the real git diff — an agent that cannot run is reported as gateNotRun, never a fabricated clean.
defaultPrompt: Have Codex review the diff in src/auth
Let Grok build the parser in src/parse.ts
Have Claude review this module, read-only
